title: Eczema
license_notes: Use as public patient-education source support. Avoid verbatim copying into primitives.
supports: Eczema is a general term for several types of rash, with atopic dermatitis being common.
Adults can have eczema, and skin may stay dry and irritated easily.
Treatment can include skin creams, medicines, light therapy, and good skin care.
Avoiding irritants and triggers can help prevent flares.
